notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Bryan Hudson on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling pops out to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Jahmai Jones singles on a ground ball to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling singles on a fly ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery. Riley Greene scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Colt Keith to 2nd.
